name: Steak Au Vin
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless strip steaks, ½ to 3/4 inch thick OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the olive oil and pepper on both sides of the steaks.
2. Heat a heavy skillet over high heat.
3. Sear the steaks quickly on both sides for approximately 30 seconds, then remove from the pan.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and add butter. When the butter melts, add shallots and sauté for 2 minutes.
5. Add Worcestershire sauce, Dijon mustard, and salt; return the steaks to the pan.
6. Cook for 2 minutes per side or until the desired doneness is reached. Remove the meat and keep warm.
7. Add wine and cook uncovered over high heat until reduced by half. Stir in brandy, parsley, and chives, then simmer for 1 to 2 minutes.
8. Serve the sauce over steak. Makes 2 servings.
